Tocilizumab has been formally evaluated in clinical practice for COVID-19 through numerous randomized controlled trials, including those assessing its impact on disease severity and progression to respiratory failure among critically ill adults. These assessments were supported by official recommendations from institutions such as the NIH and IDSA regarding its use during hospitalization when inflammation is significant.
